html:
March 31, 2026

Timing is key for central Wisconsin anglers as pressure climbs this Tuesday

Anglers heading out to the Wisconsin River will find flows running at 7,250 cfs with a 5.9 mph easterly wind and rising barometric pressure — focus on shaded structure and slow presentations. Expect a high near 56°F with daylight from 6:38 a.m. to 7:26 p.m. Today looks like the best fishing day this week, with a high near 56°F and low chance of rain on area rivers and lakes.

View full river conditions, fishing forecast and more →

Data from USGS, National Weather Service and Solunar.org. Updated every 30 minutes.
